title: UW-Madison Google Workspace - Moving between apps
body: Moving between apps in your UW-Madison Google Workspace account When you log in to your UW-Madison Google Workspace account, you will be automatically directed to the Google Drive app: UW-Madison Google Workspace - Log in To switch between different apps, select the app button which is in the top-right corner. Once you click the app button, you icons for several other apps are displayed. To open one of these apps, click on the app icon . Click on More from Google Workplace Marketplace at the bottom to view additional apps.
